sheet.example: She wrote her answers on a sheet of paper.
sheet.example_zh: 她把答案寫在一張紙上。

sheet.example: She put clean sheets on the bed.
sheet.example_zh: 她替床鋪上乾淨的床單。

shelf.example: The books are on the top shelf.

shell.example: I found a pretty shell on the beach.
shell.example_zh: 我在海灘上撿到一個漂亮的貝殼。

shine.example: He shined his shoes before the party.

shock.example: The bad news was a great shock.
shock.example_zh: 這個壞消息是個很大的打擊。
他無禮的話讓大家很震驚。

shoot.example: He learned to shoot a basketball.
They shot the movie in Taiwan.
shoot.example_zh: 他們在台灣拍這部電影。

shore.example: We walked along the shore at sunset.
shore.example_zh: 我們在日落時沿著海岸散步。

shot.example: The player scored with a long shot.
shot.example_zh: 那名球員從遠處投進得分。

shot.example: The nurse gave me a flu shot.
shot.example_zh: 護理師幫我打了流感疫苗。

shut.example: The shop is shut on Sundays.

shy.example: The shy boy hid behind his mother.
shy.example_zh: 害羞的男孩躲在媽媽身後。

sidewalk.example: Walk on the sidewalk, not the road.
sidewalk.example_zh: 走人行道，別走在馬路上。

silence.example: There was complete silence in the room.
She raised her hand to silence the class.
silence.example_zh: 她舉手讓全班安靜下來。

silent.example: Everyone was silent during the test.

silver.example: The spoon is made of silver.

similar.example_zh: 他們的聲音聽起來很像。

simply.example: I simply forgot to call you.
She explained it simply and clearly.

single.example: Not a single cloud was in the sky.

skill.example_zh: 烹飪是一項有用的技能。

slide.example: The book slid off the table.
The children went down the slide.

slip.example: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor.
slip.example_zh: 小心別在濕地板上滑倒。

slip.example: She slipped out of the room quietly.

slipper.example: She wears soft slippers at home.
slipper.example_zh: 她在家穿著柔軟的拖鞋。

smooth.example: The road was wide and smooth.
The trip was smooth and pleasant.

snack.example: I had a snack between meals.
snack.example_zh: 我在兩餐之間吃了點心。

snowy.example: It was a cold and snowy day.
snowy.example_zh: 那是個寒冷又下雪的日子。

social.example: She has a busy social life.

society.example: Rules help our society run smoothly.

sock.example: I can't find my other sock.

soda.example: Too much soda is bad for your teeth.
soda.example_zh: 喝太多汽水對牙齒不好。

soft.example: The kitten's fur is very soft.
She spoke in a soft voice.

soil.example: Plants grow well in rich soil.
soil.example_zh: 植物在肥沃的土壤裡長得好。

solution.example: We found a solution to the problem.
solution.example_zh: 我們找到了問題的解決辦法。

solution.example: Mix the salt into the solution.

solve.example: Can you solve this math problem?
solve.example_zh: 你能解開這道數學題嗎？

sort.example: What sort of music do you like?
Please sort the books by size.

source.example: The sun is a source of energy.

southern.example: It is warmer in the southern part.

speaker.example: The speaker shared a great story.
speaker.example_zh: 講者分享了一個很棒的故事。

speech.example: She gave a speech in front of the class.
speech.example_zh: 她在全班面前發表演說。

speech.example: Freedom of speech is a basic right.

speed.example: Please reduce your speed near the school.
The car sped up on the highway.

spelling.example: Check the spelling of each word.

spider.example: A spider spun a web in the corner.

spirit.example: She has a strong fighting spirit.
Her kind words lifted my spirits.
spirit.example_zh: 她親切的話讓我精神一振。

spoon.example: Eat the soup with a spoon.

sport.example_zh: 籃球是我最喜歡的運動。

spot.example: This is a great spot for a picnic.
There is a spot on your shirt.
She spotted her friend in the crowd.
spot.example_zh: 她在人群中認出她的朋友。

spread.example: He spread butter on the bread.

stage.example: The singer walked onto the stage.
The plan is still at an early stage.

stamp.example: She put a stamp on the envelope.

standard.example: This is the standard size for paper.
